narrative.summary: New hidden alleyway location, established local brand, excellent bagels + coffee

blocks.title: The Vibe
blocks.body:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "a little hidden location but inside is so stylish and cozy! i got a bagel with garlic and herbs spread it was really really good and my americano was good too. very nice ambiance and vibes, if i didnt live so far i would come back very often!"

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Great vibes. Tucked away in a laneway it looks very non descript on the outside, but on the inside it's very cozy.

Ordered a cortado and chocolate croissant. Cortado was great. Croissant was okay."

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "I’ve been on the cafe hunt for years now, and I think I found my favourite.

This has it all; immaculate vibes across three seating areas for socializing or diving into a book, unreal oat cortados; and friendly professional staff.

I love this spot. Might be the ideal happy place for those seeking peace."
